unresolved_tensions.description: Tension between features exhibiting near-constant values (low cardinality) and other features showing strong class-conditioned structural variation.
context_notes: Some features are almost constant across the partition while others vary strongly by class, indicating heterogeneous structural stability.
This tension may complicate interpretation of feature relevance and stability.
unresolved_tensions.reason_unresolved: Insufficient evidence to determine if low cardinality features mask subtle class differences or represent stable background signals.
